---
title: API Usage
date: "2026-04-08"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{API Usage}
  %\VignetteEngine{litedown::vignette}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---



## Introduction

Create a `storr` either via `storr_tiledb()`:


``` r
uri <- tempfile()
sto <- storr_tiledb(uri, init = TRUE)
```

Or more explicitly:


``` r
uri2 <- tempfile()
dr <- driver_tiledb(uri2, init = TRUE)
sto2 <- storr::storr(dr)
```

The first approach generates a `TileDBStorr` object that represents the storr interface optimised for TileDB storage and provides additional functionality.
The latter is the standard `storr` object.

## API Usage

### 1. get, set, del

``` r
dat <- head(mtcars, 2)

# set
sto$set("a", dat)
sto$set("b", list(name = "John"))
sto$mset(c("a", "b", "c"), value = list(dat, dat, dat), namespace = "ns1")

# get
sto$get("b")
# $name
# [1] "John"
sto$mget(c("b", "b"), namespace = c("objects", "ns1"))
# [[1]]
# [[1]]$name
# [1] "John"
# 
# 
# [[2]]
#               mpg cyl disp  hp drat    wt  qsec vs am gear
# Mazda RX4      21   6  160 110  3.9 2.620 16.46  0  1    4
# Mazda RX4 Wag  21   6  160 110  3.9 2.875 17.02  0  1    4
#               carb
# Mazda RX4        4
# Mazda RX4 Wag    4

# list keys
sto$list("objects")
# [1] "a" "b"
sto$list("ns1")
# [1] "a" "b" "c"

# list namespaces
sto$list_namespaces()
# [1] "ns1"     "objects"

# list hashes
sto$list_hashes()
# [1] "20bce84369c17ac389b9b60fe0add435"
# [2] "7bf9fc55c201456723db2c7ed050af32"

# del
sto$del("a")
sto$del("b")
sto$exists("a")
# [1] FALSE

# Retrieve hashes and namespaces
sto$list_namespaces()
# [1] "ns1"
sto$list_hashes()
# [1] "20bce84369c17ac389b9b60fe0add435"
# [2] "7bf9fc55c201456723db2c7ed050af32"

# Delete unused hash
sto$gc()
sto$list_hashes()
# [1] "20bce84369c17ac389b9b60fe0add435"

# Delete by namespace
sto$clear("ns1")
# [1] TRUE
sto$list("ns1")
# character(0)
```

### 2. Key Metadata methods

``` r
# Expires in 5 minutes
sto$set("aa", 1, expires_at = Sys.time() + 60 * 5, 
        notes = "{\"name\":\"John\",\"id\":12345}")

# Expires in 1 second
sto$set("bb", 1, expires_at = Sys.time() + 1)

# Retrieve key metadata
sto$get_keymeta("aa", use_cache = FALSE)
# $expires_at
# [1] "2026-04-08 12:18:57 EEST"
# 
# $notes
# [1] "{\"name\":\"John\",\"id\":12345}"
sto$mget_keymeta(c("aa", "bb"), use_cache = TRUE)
# [[1]]
# [[1]]$expires_at
# [1] "2026-04-08 12:18:57 EEST"
# 
# [[1]]$notes
# [1] "{\"name\":\"John\",\"id\":12345}"
# 
# 
# [[2]]
# [[2]]$expires_at
# [1] "2026-04-08 12:13:58 EEST"
# 
# [[2]]$notes
# [1] NA
```

**Expiration management**

``` r
# Update key metadata
sto$set_keymeta("bb", notes = "Updated Note")
sto$get_keymeta("bb")
# $expires_at
# [1] "2026-04-08 12:13:58 EEST"
# 
# $notes
# [1] "Updated Note"

# Retrieve keys with expiration
sto$keys_with_expiration()
#    namespace    key          expires_at
#       <char> <char>              <POSc>
# 1:   objects     aa 2026-04-08 12:18:57
# 2:   objects     bb 2026-04-08 12:13:58

Sys.sleep(1)

# Retrieve expired keys
sto$expired_keys()
#    namespace    key          expires_at
#       <char> <char>              <POSc>
# 1:   objects     bb 2026-04-08 12:13:58

# Remove expired keys
sto$clear_expired_keys()

# Check for expired keys
sto$has_expired_keys()
# [1] FALSE

# Or via gc()
sto$gc(clear_expired = TRUE)


# Clear metadata
sto$set_keymeta("aa", expires_at = as.POSIXct(NA), notes = NA_character_)
sto$get_keymeta("aa")
# $expires_at
# [1] NA
# 
# $notes
# [1] NA
```


### 3. Async methods
